## Operator screenshot finding
GitHub Actions UI still shows old run failures for commits before the repair, including RM02 commit 429b86945a053c89e421abb345e00f6ee6d33780. That run used the broken .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml content from that commit and remains failed historically.

## Current correction
RM04 repair SHA 212dc1ac70c21b4125f9d94c5401b54097997100 rewrote the active workflow as single-line JSON/YAML flow mapping to avoid executor multiline YAML corruption. RM04B SHA 2ca18d50a2cb9b545e760a05a77d99ab8d4fdc07 recorded the verification evidence. RM03B SHA dd82d753580e86ab11e5d67fba298a88c2bc067f superseded the premature RM03 evidence pack.

## Rule
Old failed GitHub Actions runs are not overwritten by later commits. Current validity must be judged from the latest workflow file after RM04/RM04B, not from historical RM02 run UI.

## Next
Run the next governance contour phase from AGENT_CONTEXT.md and keep release evidence SHA-backed.
